# `orch configure-local`; only the keys below apply on this machine — never
# a substitute for the committed configuration, and never itself committed.

[hosts.claude.roles.architect]
model = "claude-fable-5"

[hosts.claude.roles.scout]
model = "claude-opus-4-8"
